Chapter: Church Organization Chart.
Current document status: Draft.

Section: KBC Organization Chart.

Section: Purpose.

This document provides a working organization chart for Kingsville Baptist Church based on the current financial operations modernization documents.

It is intended to help leaders see the difference between:

Congregational authority.
Elected officers and committees.
Ministry leadership.
Financial operations support.
Committee recommendations and coordination.

Needs Bylaw Review: This chart should be checked against the KBC Constitution and Bylaws, committee charters, and current church practice before being treated as authoritative.

Section: Simple Governance View.

Diagram omitted. See the documentation site for the visual version.

Section: Financial Operations View.

Diagram omitted. See the documentation site for the visual version.

Section: Practical Role Summary.

Table summary.
Body / Role: Congregation. Primary Accountability: Final church authority where bylaws, budget, policy, officer election, or church practice require a vote.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: On June 28, 2026, authorized adding a paid, part-time Bookkeeper position not to exceed $150 per week and gave Personnel Committee authority to hire the right candidate; votes later on items that require additional church approval..
Body / Role: Pastor. Primary Accountability: Spiritual and ministry leadership, communication, and counsel.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: Helps keep the process calm, ministry-focused, and aligned with church leadership..
Body / Role: Deacons. Primary Accountability: Servant leadership, care, counsel, and leadership review where church practice requires.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: May review major recommendations, help preserve unity, and support communication with the church..
Body / Role: Nominating Committee. Primary Accountability: Officer and committee nomination process where assigned by bylaws.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: Works with Personnel Committee to add the paid Bookkeeper position under the June 28, 2026 motion; involved in Treasurer / Financial Officer recommendations if bylaws assign that role..
Body / Role: Finance Committee. Primary Accountability: Financial governance, controls, budget oversight, software, monthly review, and financial policies.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: Defines financial duties, software requirements, reimbursement rules, spending authority, card/payment controls, audit/review process, and budget impact; adjusts the budget to fund the Bookkeeper need under the June 28, 2026 motion..
Body / Role: Personnel Committee. Primary Accountability: Job descriptions, hiring, compensation recommendations, and evaluation process.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: Leads the authorized hiring process for the paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator after Finance Committee confirms financial duties and controls..
Body / Role: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Primary Accountability: Elected financial accountability, reporting, review, and coordination with Finance Committee.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: Reviews reports, helps present financial information, confirms policies are followed, and coordinates with the Bookkeeper and Finance Committee..
Body / Role: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Primary Accountability: Day-to-day financial operations under assigned supervision and approved financial controls.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: Maintains records, enters transactions, supports deposits, processes reimbursements after approval, prepares report packets, and supports monthly close..
Body / Role: Outside Payroll / Accounting Vendor. Primary Accountability: Professional processing and compliance support if contracted.. Main Responsibilities In This Project: Handles payroll, tax forms, accounting setup, review, or other specialized services assigned by church-approved process..

Section: Recommended Reporting And Coordination Lines.

These lines should be confirmed before hiring or final implementation:
